message:
help me fix CapEziParts.API.Services.ILoggingService[0]
      => SpanId:be2176215afe7477, TraceId:9e5b117af19df0cb684ca567e01e6d52, ParentId:0000000000000000 => ConnectionId:0HNDOBQVC0THS => RequestPath:/supplier/dashboard/quotes RequestId:0HNDOBQVC0THS:00000004
      Something went wrong: System.InvalidOperationException: The LINQ expression 'DbSet<PartRequestSupplier>()
          .Where(p => p.UserId == ___userContext_UserId_0)
          .LeftJoin(
              inner: DbSet<Quote>(),
              outerKeySelector: p => EF.Property<long?>(p, "Id"),
              innerKeySelector: q => EF.Property<long?>(q, "PartRequestSupplierId"),
              resultSelector: (o, i) => new TransparentIdentifier<PartRequestSupplier, Quote>(
                  Outer = o,
                  Inner = i
              ))
          .Where(p => p.Inner == null)
          .Where(p => PartRequestSupplierRepository.IncludePartRequestSupplier(p.Outer))' could not be translated. Either rewrite the query in a form that can be translated, or switch to client evaluation explicitly by inserting a call to 'AsEnumerable', 'AsAsyncEnumerable', 'ToList', or 'ToListAsync'. See https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=2101038 for more information.
